task_completion.description: The title 'On the Origin of Species' is centered, bold, and 16pt or larger.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'On the Origin of Species' at the top of the document is visually centered on the page, has a bold font weight, and is significantly larger than the body text (indicating 16pt or larger). The toolbar may also show 'Center' alignment and 'Bold' selected when the cursor is on this line.

task_completion.description: The author line 'Charles Darwin' is centered and italicized.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Charles Darwin' is visually centered on the page and has an italicized font style. The toolbar may show 'Center' alignment and 'Italic' selected.

task_completion.description: Main section headings are formatted with Heading 1 style.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Headings such as 'Variation Under Domestication' and 'Struggle for Existence' are styled distinctly (typically large and bold). The style dropdown in the toolbar should display 'Heading 1' when the cursor is placed on these lines.

task_completion.description: Subsection headings are formatted with Heading 2 style.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Subheadings such as 'Causes of Variability' and 'Geometrical Ratio of Increase' are styled distinctly, appearing slightly smaller than Heading 1 but larger/bolder than body text. The style dropdown should display 'Heading 2' when the cursor is on these lines.

task_completion.description: All body text paragraphs are justified.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main paragraph text has straight, flush edges on both the left and right margins. The 'Justify' alignment button in the toolbar should be highlighted when the cursor is in the body text.

task_completion.description: The changes are saved to the correct file path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The application title bar shows 'origin_of_species.odt'. There should be evidence of the agent clicking the 'Save' icon (floppy disk) or using File > Save after making the formatting changes.

integrity.description: The agent used the Calligra Words GUI to format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Calligra Words application open with the document being edited visually, rather than terminal windows executing scripts or command-line document converters.

integrity.description: The agent modified the existing document rather than creating a new one from scratch.
integrity.visual_evidence: The body text contains the original Darwin excerpts (e.g., 'great variability is due to our domestic productions') and was not replaced by dummy text or copy-pasted plain text.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass GUI interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows showing python scripts, `sed`, `pandoc`, or other command-line tools being used to manipulate the .odt file directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The document path is '/home/ga/Documents/origin_of_species.odt'. The title is exactly 'On the Origin of Species' and the author is 'Charles Darwin'. Main section headings (Heading 1) are: 'Variation Under Domestication', 'Variation Under Nature', 'Struggle for Existence', 'Natural Selection'. Subsection headings (Heading 2) are: 'Causes of Variability', 'Effects of Habit and Use', 'Geometrical Ratio of Increase', 'Complex Relations of All Animals'. Body text to check for justified alignment includes phrases like: 'great variability is due to our domestic productions', 'No one supposes that all the individuals', 'on the principle of geometrical increase', and 'the relations of all animals and plants'.
